description.ko: 유체 역학과 생물학적 우아함이 빛의 매끄러운 춤으로 어우러지는, 움직이는 자연 에너지의 매혹적인 전시입니다.
description.en: A captivating display of natural energy in motion, where fluid dynamics and biological elegance merge into a seamless dance of light.

prompt: An abstract visualization of organic flow, featuring iridescent liquid silk swirling in a deep cosmic void, bioluminescent fibers intertwining like neural networks, golden ratio patterns, soft glowing gradients of amber and cyan, hyper-detailed fluid textures, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
